videos.title: Youth Class Series # 3: Dennis Small "Does the Infinite Exist?"
videos.description:
In an October 16, 2001 conference in Rome on a Dialogue of Civilizations, Lyndon LaRouche stated:
“What has to be done is to address the real problem, which is the financial, monetary crisis… In order to do that, we have to reach agreements on economic development in Eurasia, and then we face the problem of how do we transform a perception on the part of Japan, of China, of India, of Southeast Asia, how do we have an understanding on their part, as well as ours, of how we are going to work together? What principles, what ideas are we going to have, which are positive ideas of cooperation, not just trade? We must then have a conception of the issue of man. We must have a dialogue of cultures, but a dialogue not within a Pantheon, but a dialogue of cultures on the subject of the nature of man.”

videos.title: Youth Class Series # 2: Jacques Cheminade "New Fascism, Or New Mutual Development Architecture?"
videos.description:
In this second class, Jacques Cheminade will expose the true nature of the new fascism and the alternative to it. Do the names David Sacks, the crypto king in the White House, Scott Bessent, Secretary of the Treasury, Stephen Miran, head of the Economic Analysis Council in the White House, Paul Atkins, head of the Security Exchange Commission, or especially Peter Thiel ring a bell? Yet these are the people who publicly believe they should be the masters of the world, along with their historical mentors in the City of London.

They are the ones who make money with money, with no investment in the physical world other than rearmament to impose their fake currency. They are the ones for whom Donald Trump and his family are puppets destined to rule through fear. We must respond with a policy of justice and national cohesion and, internationally, with a new architecture of mutual development and security for all, a benchmark and a horizon. As the poet Friedrich Schiller said: "What You Love, You Own; What You Hate, You Lose."

videos.title: Youth Class Series #1: Helga Zepp-LaRouche "Statecraft for a New Economic Order"
videos.description:
On January 24, 2026, Schiller Institute founder  Helga Zepp-LaRouche gave the first in a series of Schiller Institute classes for the growing International Youth Movement for a new, just security and development architecture. Young people from around the world, including such nations as Nigeria, Yemen, Burkina Faso, Mali, Niger, Uganda, Kenya, Colombia, Venezuela, and Mexico met to learn of the ideas of Lyndon LaRouche, Gottfried Leibniz, and Friedrich Schiller from Helga.

This video contains her lecture, which emphasizes the subjective transformation that young people must take on in order to qualify themselves for leadership during a period of great strategic danger and even greater potential for an harmonious future.
